title: Freeze the evaluation contract
objective: Make scores comparable across tasks, weeks, and generations by freezing the five evaluation dimensions and their weights as machine-readable constants.
context: Without a frozen scoring contract, improvement claims become apples-to-oranges. This task produces the evaluation-contract.json with the five dimensions (task_outcome 0.30, regression_safety 0.25, mutation_discipline 0.15, evidence_quality 0.15, honesty_boundary_discipline 0.15), thresholds, and a contract test that rejects missing or renormalized dimensions.
pass_threshold: Every public task packet and every private-holdout packet uses the five frozen dimensions; weights sum to 1.0; task pass and promotion thresholds are checked in as machine-readable constants.
failure_interpretation: Improvement claims become apples-to-oranges because the judging contract keeps moving.
